<!-- Generated by `npm run build:context` (GRAMMAR.md §10). Do not edit by hand. -->

# <zbk-pagination>

The zebkit pagination: a light-DOM element rendering page navigation for a
partitioned collection as a `<nav>` of page items with previous/next
controls, `aria-current="page"` on the current page, and a windowed page
display with ellipses. Items are real links when `href-template` is set
(the browser navigates); otherwise they are buttons and a choice surfaces
as the cancelable `zbk-page-change` event — uncanceled, the element adopts
the page and announces "Page X of Y" through the shared live region.

Base class: `.zbk-pagination`. Variant classes: `.zbk-pagination--{variant}`. Tokens: `--zbk-pagination-{property}[-{state}]`. Write `aria-*`/`role` on the element; they relocate to the internal native element. `focus()` forwards to the internal focusable.

## When to use

- A collection is split into pages and the user moves between them (search results, tables, archives).
- Each page has a real URL — set href-template and every item becomes a link the browser (and crawlers, and middle-click) can follow.
- Page state lives in the app — omit href-template and items are buttons surfacing the cancelable zbk-page-change event.
- NOT The collection loads incrementally on one page (infinite scroll, "load more"). → zbk-button
- NOT Sequential steps in a flow (wizard, checkout). → A step indicator — steps are a process with an order, not a partitioned collection.

## Guidance

- One spelling per navigation intent: href-template present means links (the browser navigates, no event); absent means buttons (zbk-page-change fires and, uncanceled, the element adopts the page and announces it).
- Canceling zbk-page-change (preventDefault) keeps current unchanged — the consumer owns the state and sets current itself.
- The window keeps a constant width of boundaries*2 + siblings*2 + 3 items so the control never reflows while paging; an ellipsis never hides a single page.
- The nav defaults its accessible name to "Pagination"; set aria-label on the element when a page has more than one pagination region.

## Attributes

| Attribute | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `current` | `number` | `1` | The current page, 1-based. Values outside 1..total warn and clamp. |
| `total` | `number` | `1` | Total number of pages in the collection. |
| `siblings` | `number` | `1` | Page neighbors shown on each side of the current page. |
| `boundaries` | `number` | `1` | Pages pinned at each end of the window. |
| `compact` | `boolean` | `false` | Compact presentation: previous/next around a "Page X of Y" readout. |
| `href-template` | `string \| undefined` | — | URL template with a `{page}` placeholder (e.g. "?page={page}"). When set, items render as real links and navigation is the browser's — better for crawlers and modified-click. Leave unset for buttons + `zbk-page-change`. |
| `variant` | `string` | `""` | Space-separated registered variant names, e.g. "ghost lg". Unknown names warn with the registered vocabulary. |

## Slots

| Slot | Description | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `icon` | Replaces a drawn chevron glyph: data-position="start" is the previous control's glyph, data-position="end" the next control's — any markup: svg, icon-font glyph, HTML character, image. | aria-hidden; sized by `icon-size`; data-position: start\\|end |

- `icon`: The glyphs are aria-hidden; the controls keep their "Previous page" / "Next page" accessible names regardless of what renders inside them.

## Keyboard

- `Tab / Shift+Tab` — Moves through the page and previous/next controls (native behavior, preserved). Disabled previous/next controls in button mode stay focusable via aria-disabled so the user's place is kept at the ends.
- `Enter / Space` — Activates the focused control (native button behavior; links activate on Enter only, as links do).

## Events

- `zbk-page-change` — A page was chosen in button mode. `detail.page` is the requested page; `preventDefault()` keeps `current` unchanged for consumers that own the state.

## Examples

**Basic (buttons + event)**

```html
<zbk-pagination current="3" total="12"></zbk-pagination>
```

**Real URLs per page**

```html
<zbk-pagination current="3" total="12" href-template="?page={page}"></zbk-pagination>
```

href-template turns every item into a real link — crawlers, middle-click, and open-in-new-tab all work; there is no event to wire.

**Compact**

```html
<zbk-pagination compact current="3" total="12"></zbk-pagination>
```

Previous/next around a "Page 3 of 12" readout — for narrow containers where a page window cannot fit.

**Wider window**

```html
<zbk-pagination current="25" total="50" siblings="2" boundaries="2"></zbk-pagination>
```

**Custom control glyphs**

```html
<zbk-pagination current="2" total="5"><span slot="icon" data-position="start">&#8592;</span><span slot="icon" data-position="end">&#8594;</span></zbk-pagination>
```

**Pagination as a stepper** (discouraged)

```html
<zbk-pagination current="2" total="4" aria-label="Checkout steps"></zbk-pagination>
```

Steps are a process, not a partitioned collection: they have names, completion state, and usually cannot be jumped to freely. Use a step indicator pattern.

## Tokens (CSS custom properties)

Values are alias references (`{family.name}` compiles to `var(--zbk-family-name)`) or structural literals. Override any of them on a selector to re-style; nothing else is needed.

| Token | Default | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `--zbk-pagination-ink` | `{action.ink}` | color | Label color of page, previous, and next items. |
| `--zbk-pagination-ink-hover` | `{action.ink-emphasis}` | color | Item label color when hovered. |
| `--zbk-pagination-ink-active` | `{action.ink-emphasis}` | color | Item label color when pressed. |
| `--zbk-pagination-ink-disabled` | `{disabled.ink}` | color | Label color of a disabled previous/next control. |
| `--zbk-pagination-ink-selected` | `{app.ink-inverse}` | color | Label color of the current page item (aria-current). |
| `--zbk-pagination-canvas` | `transparent` | color | Item background at rest. |
| `--zbk-pagination-canvas-hover` | `{action.canvas-subtle}` | color | Item background when hovered. |
| `--zbk-pagination-canvas-active` | `{action.canvas-muted}` | color | Item background when pressed. |
| `--zbk-pagination-canvas-disabled` | `transparent` | color | Background of a disabled previous/next control. |
| `--zbk-pagination-canvas-selected` | `{accent-primary.500}` | color | Background of the current page item (aria-current). |
| `--zbk-pagination-border-color` | `transparent` | color | Item border color at rest. |
| `--zbk-pagination-border-color-hover` | `transparent` | color | Item border color when hovered. |
| `--zbk-pagination-border-color-active` | `transparent` | color | Item border color when pressed. |
| `--zbk-pagination-border-color-disabled` | `transparent` | color | Border color of a disabled previous/next control. |
| `--zbk-pagination-border-color-selected` | `{accent-primary.500}` | color | Border color of the current page item (aria-current). |
| `--zbk-pagination-border-width` | `{border.width-sm}` | dimension | Item border width. |
| `--zbk-pagination-border-style` | `{border.style}` | borderStyle | Item border style. |
| `--zbk-pagination-border-radius` | `{border.radius-md}` | dimension | Item corner radius. |
| `--zbk-pagination-font-family` | `{font-family.interface}` | fontFamily | Font family for pagination content. |
| `--zbk-pagination-font-size` | `{font-size.md}` | cssDimension | Base font size for pagination content. |
| `--zbk-pagination-font-weight` | `{font-weight.medium}` | fontWeight | Font weight for pagination content. |
| `--zbk-pagination-line-height` | `{line-height.2}` | lineHeight | Line height for pagination content. |
| `--zbk-pagination-display` | `inline-flex` | display | Display mode for the pagination nav. |
| `--zbk-pagination-gap` | `{spacing.2xs}` | dimension | Gap between pagination items. |
| `--zbk-pagination-min-width` | `{a11y.min-interaction-size}` | dimension | Minimum item width to keep the tap target. |
| `--zbk-pagination-min-height` | `{a11y.min-interaction-size}` | dimension | Minimum item height to keep the tap target. |
| `--zbk-pagination-padding-inline` | `{spacing.2xs}` | dimension | Inline padding inside each item. |
| `--zbk-pagination-padding-block` | `{spacing.2xs}` | dimension | Block padding inside each item. |
| `--zbk-pagination-icon-size` | `{pagination.font-size}` | cssDimension | Size of the previous/next glyphs (drawn or slotted). |
| `--zbk-pagination-ellipsis-ink` | `{app.ink-subtle}` | color | Color of the non-interactive ellipsis separators. |
| `--zbk-pagination-status-ink` | `{app.ink}` | color | Color of the compact-mode "Page X of Y" status text. |
| `--zbk-pagination-focus-color` | `{focus.color}` | color | Outline color for a focused item. |
| `--zbk-pagination-focus-width` | `{focus.width}` | dimension | Outline width for a focused item. |
| `--zbk-pagination-focus-offset` | `{focus.offset}` | dimension | Outline offset for a focused item. |
| `--zbk-pagination-transition-property` | `background-color, color, border-color, outline` | transition | CSS properties that animate on item interaction. |
| `--zbk-pagination-transition-duration` | `150ms` | transition | Duration for item hover/active transitions. **(a11y)** |
| `--zbk-pagination-transition-timing-function` | `ease-out` | transition | Timing function for item transitions. |
| `--zbk-pagination-cursor` | `pointer` | utility | Cursor over interactive pagination items. |

## Variants

A variant is a named, partial remapping of the token surface compiled to a class. Apply via `variant="name other-name"`; different axes compose, same-axis variants are alternatives.

| Variant | Axis | Class | Description | Overrides |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `lg` | size | `zbk-pagination--lg` | Larger type and roomier item padding. | font-size: {font-size.lg}; padding-inline: {spacing.xs}; padding-block: {spacing.xs} |
| `sm` | size | `zbk-pagination--sm` | Smaller type; keeps the 44px minimum tap target. | font-size: {font-size.sm} |

Custom variants: add a `zbk-pagination.variants.json` file to the base theme's token folder (component-keyed map of `{ "pagination": { "{name}": { "overrides": { ... } } } }`; token keys must exist in the table above, values are alias references or structural literals). A shipped variant name patches that variant's CSS — usable immediately. A new name compiles a new `.zbk-pagination--{name}` class and additionally needs `ZebkitElement.registerVariants(json)` before elements upgrade so `variant="{name}"` validates and applies it.

Related: `<zbk-button>`.
